83.reason: [This early return discards the rest of the line after "/*", but fails to handle multi-line block comments correctly. If a line starts with "/*" and doesn't end with "*/", the lexer skips the entire line and all subsequent lines until "*/" is found—but this implementation only processes one line at a time and loses context across lines, causing incorrect tokenization or missed errors. However, the immediate bug relevant to error type 'a' is elsewhere.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Fails to handle multi-line comments correctly: if a line starts inside a /* ... */ comment (i.e., notation_flag is carried over from previous lines), this function returns early and skips lexical analysis for the rest of the line even if it contains code after "*/".
